title: Untamed
description: A top-notch vanilla +++ mod pack that significantly enhances the user experience of Minecraft!
body:
![Untamed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af45ed633049a200d015b08cc9027784dee17a91.png)
This Vanilla++++++++ Modpack is designed for Minecraft enthusiasts who love the classic vanilla experience but crave more depth, excitement, and functionality. This modpack enhances the core game with a variety of carefully selected mods that add new features, optimize performance, and improve the overall gameplay.

Key Features:
            
1. Enhanced World Generation
2. Quality of Life Improvements
3. Expanded Building Options
4. New Mechanics and Enhancements
5. Performance Optimizations
6. Minor Tweaks
